Uses of Interface
org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.VarFunction

Packages that use VarFunction
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.commons.svl
Simple Variable Language
org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.functions
Built-in VarFunction catalog for #{name(args...)} script-evaluation syntax.

  • Uses of VarFunction in org.apache.juneau.commons.svl

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.commons.svl that implement VarFunction
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    TypedFunction
    Reflection-based base class for VarFunction implementations that prefer typed argument signatures over manual List<Object> unpacking.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.svl that return types with arguments of type VarFunction
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected Map<String,VarFunction>
    VarResolver.getFunctionMap()
    Returns an unmodifiable map of VarFunctions associated with this context.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.svl with parameters of type VarFunction
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    VarResolver.Builder
    VarResolver.Builder.functions(VarFunction... values)
    Register one or more VarFunction instances on this builder.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    ArithmeticFunctions.Abs
    #{abs(a)} — returns the absolute value of a.
    static class 
    ArithmeticFunctions.Add
    #{add(a, b)} — returns a + b.
    static class 
    ArithmeticFunctions.Divide
    #{divide(a, b)} — returns a / b.
    static class 
    ArithmeticFunctions.Max
    #{max(a, b)} — returns the larger of two numbers.
    static class 
    ArithmeticFunctions.Min
    #{min(a, b)} — returns the smaller of two numbers.
    static class 
    ArithmeticFunctions.Modulo
    #{modulo(a, b)} — returns a % b.
    static class 
    ArithmeticFunctions.Multiply
    #{multiply(a, b)} — returns a * b.
    static class 
    ArithmeticFunctions.Subtract
    #{subtract(a, b)} — returns a - b.
    static class 
    BooleanFunctions.And
    #{and(a, b, ...)} — returns "true" only if all args are true.
    static class 
    BooleanFunctions.Eq
    #{eq(a, b)} — string-equality.
    static class 
    BooleanFunctions.Gt
    #{gt(a, b)} — numeric greater-than.
    static class 
    BooleanFunctions.Gte
    #{gte(a, b)} — numeric greater-than-or-equal.
    static class 
    BooleanFunctions.Lt
    #{lt(a, b)} — numeric less-than.
    static class 
    BooleanFunctions.Lte
    #{lte(a, b)} — numeric less-than-or-equal.
    static class 
    BooleanFunctions.Neq
    #{neq(a, b)} — string-inequality.
    static class 
    BooleanFunctions.Not
    #{not(a)} — returns the boolean negation of a.
    static class 
    BooleanFunctions.Or
    #{or(a, b, ...)} — returns "true" if any arg is true.
    static class 
    BooleanFunctions.Xor
    #{xor(a, b)} — returns a XOR b.
    static class 
    ConditionalFunctions.Coalesce
    #{coalesce(a, b, ...)} — replacement for the legacy $CO{...}.
    static class 
    ConditionalFunctions.If
    #{if(cond, then, else)} — replacement for the legacy $IF{...}.
    static class 
    ConditionalFunctions.NotEmpty
    #{notEmpty(s)} — replacement for the legacy $NE{...}.
    static class 
    ConditionalFunctions.Switch
    #{switch(value, case1, val1, case2, val2, ..., default)} — replacement for the legacy $SW{...}.
    static class 
    DateFunctions.FormatDate
    #{formatDate(epoch)} — renders epoch as ISO-8601 (Instant.toString()).
    static class 
    DateFunctions.Now
    #{now()} — current epoch milliseconds (UTC).
    static class 
    DateFunctions.ParseDate
    #{parseDate(s)} / #{parseDate(s, format)} — parses an ISO-8601 string or a DateTimeFormatter-pattern string to epoch milliseconds.
    static class 
    EncodingFunctions.Base64Decode
    #{base64Decode(s)} — Base64-decodes s (UTF-8 result).
    static class 
    EncodingFunctions.Base64Encode
    #{base64Encode(s)} — Base64-encodes s (UTF-8).
    static class 
    EncodingFunctions.HtmlEscape
    #{htmlEscape(s)} — escapes &, <, >, ", ' (the OWASP minimal HTML-injection-safe set).
    static class 
    EncodingFunctions.HtmlUnescape
    #{htmlUnescape(s)} — inverse of EncodingFunctions.HtmlEscape.
    static class 
    EncodingFunctions.UrlDecode
    #{urlDecode(s)} — URL-form-decodes.
    static class 
    EncodingFunctions.UrlEncode
    #{urlEncode(s)} — URL-form-encodes (i.e.
    static class 
    JsonFunctions.Get
    #{get(json, key)} — extracts json[key] (object) or json[index] (array, when key parses as int).
    static class 
    JsonFunctions.JsonPath
    #{jsonPath(json, path)} / #{jsonPath(json, path, default)} — extracts a value via a slash-rooted path (e.g.
    static class 
    JsonFunctions.Keys
    #{keys(json)} — returns a JSON-array-shortcut string of an object's keys.
    static class 
    JsonFunctions.Size
    #{size(json)} — returns the count: object key count, array length, string length, or 0 for null/primitives.
    static class 
    JsonFunctions.Values
    #{values(json)} — returns a JSON-array-shortcut string of an object's values (or array elements).
    static class 
    RandomFunctions.Rand
    #{rand()} — random double in [0.0, 1.0).
    static class 
    RandomFunctions.RandChoice
    #{randChoice(option1, option2, ...)} — variadic.
    static class 
    RandomFunctions.RandInt
    #{randInt(max)} — random int in [0, max).
    static class 
    RandomFunctions.RandLong
    #{randLong(min, max)} — random long in [min, max] (inclusive both ends).
    static class 
    RandomFunctions.RandString
    #{randString(length)} — random alphanumeric [A-Za-z0-9] string of length characters.
    static class 
    RandomFunctions.Uuid
    #{uuid()} — random UUID via UUID.randomUUID().
    static class 
    RegexFunctions.Extract
    #{extract(s, regex)} / #{extract(s, regex, group)} — replacement for the legacy $PE{...}.
    static class 
    RegexFunctions.Match
    #{match(s, regex)} — replacement for the legacy $PM{...}.
    static class 
    RegexFunctions.ReplaceRegex
    #{replaceRegex(s, regex, replacement)} — replacement for the legacy $PR{...}.
    static class 
    StringFunctions.Concat
    #{concat(s1, s2, ...)} — variadic string concatenation.
    static class 
    StringFunctions.Contains
    #{contains(s, substr)} — returns "true" or "false".
    static class 
    StringFunctions.EndsWith
    #{endsWith(s, suffix)} — returns "true" or "false".
    static class 
    StringFunctions.Format
    #{format(pattern, args...)} — Java formatter-style formatting.
    static class 
    StringFunctions.Join
    #{join(separator, parts...)} — concatenates parts with separator between each pair.
    static class 
    StringFunctions.Len
    #{len(s)} / #{len(s, delimiter)} — replacement for the legacy $LN{...}.
    static class 
    StringFunctions.Lower
    #{lower(s)} — replacement for the legacy $LC{...}.
    static class 
    StringFunctions.PathToken
    #{pathToken(s)} — normalize a user-supplied path token for safe interpolation into a path= template.
    static class 
    StringFunctions.Repeat
    #{repeat(s, n)} — repeats s n times.
    static class 
    StringFunctions.Replace
    #{replace(s, target, replacement)} — literal (non-regex) string replacement.
    static class 
    StringFunctions.Reverse
    #{reverse(s)} — reverses the characters of s.
    static class 
    StringFunctions.Split
    #{split(s, separator)} — splits s on the literal separator substring.
    static class 
    StringFunctions.StartsWith
    #{startsWith(s, prefix)} — returns "true" or "false".
    static class 
    StringFunctions.StripLeading
    #{stripLeading(s)} — strips leading whitespace.
    static class 
    StringFunctions.StripSlashes
    #{stripSlashes(s)} — strips leading and trailing / characters.
    static class 
    StringFunctions.StripTrailing
    #{stripTrailing(s)} — strips trailing whitespace.
    static class 
    StringFunctions.Substring
    #{substring(s, start)} / #{substring(s, start, end)} — replacement for the legacy $ST{...} SubstringVar.
    static class 
    StringFunctions.Trim
    #{trim(s)} — strips leading and trailing whitespace.
    static class 
    StringFunctions.Upper
    #{upper(s)} — replacement for the legacy $UC{...}.
    static class 
    TypeConversionFunctions.ToBool
    #{toBool(s)} — coerces s to boolean and renders as a String.
    static class 
    TypeConversionFunctions.ToDouble
    #{toDouble(s)} — coerces s to double and renders as a String.
    static class 
    TypeConversionFunctions.ToInt
    #{toInt(s)} — coerces s to int and renders as a String.
    static class 
    TypeConversionFunctions.ToLong
    #{toLong(s)} — coerces s to long and renders as a String.
